prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约2440→2418→2786→3263→2914，整体呈后移趋势，2024年达近年最高位次3263后2025年小幅回升至2914，近3年累计后移约500名；20 25年基准约2914名；本省物理类计划2021年106人、2022年101人、2023年103人、2024年105人、2025年108人；2026年计划107人，较2025年微减1人，属 基本持平，竞争压力变化不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2024年均为第9名，2025年升至第8名，2026年保持第8名，排名稳中有升，体现学校综合实力 持续增强；2026年高考周期内武汉大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、师德师风、学校管理等多起舆情事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音 热度排名第19（高热），短视频曝光量较大，关注度较高；历史投档异常方面2023年有高关注记录，但2025–2026年未见明显断档信号；测绘科学与技术A+、法 学A+、马克思主义理论A+、地球物理学A+、水利工程A、生物学A、中国语言文学A、工商管理A、计算机科学与技术A-等，A-及以上学科达20个，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有 较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与武大优势工科方向契合；河北省2026年普通高考总人数609800人，较202 5年物理类+历史类合计606754人略有增加，物理类考生估算约36.5万人，竞争基数微增；武汉大学位于湖北，属中部地区，对河 北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在河北省招生占比约2.3%–3.0%（2021–2025年），属中等水平，无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划 基本持平、学校排名上升（第8名）与声誉偏负面相互对冲、河北省考生总数微增等因素，在2025年基准2914名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约2918名，区间2568–3268名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2440 → 2418 → 2786 → 3263 → 2914, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it reached the highest ranking in recent years at 3263, then slightly recovered to 2914 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 500 places over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2914. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 106 in 2021, 101 in 2022, 103 in 2023, 105 in 2024, and 108 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 107, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, which is essentially flat, with little change in competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 9th from 2021 to 2024, rose to 8th in 2025, and remains 8th in 2026, showing a steady increase in ranking, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Wuhan University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management, which may suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 19th (high heat), with relatively large short video exposure and high attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a high attention record in 2023, but no obvious gap signals were seen in 2025–2026. Disciplines include A+ in Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, Law, Marxist Theory, and Geophysics; A in Water Conservancy Engineering, Biology, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration; A- in Computer Science and Technology, etc., with a total of 20 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with Wuhan University's advantageous engineering directions. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hebei Province is 609,800, a slight increase from the combined total of 606,754 for Physics and History categories in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 365,000, with a slight increase in the competition base. Wuhan University is located in Hubei, in the central region, and has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0% (2021–2025), which is at a medium level, with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend, the essentially flat 2026 enrollment plan, the offsetting effects of the school's ranking rise (8th) and negative reputation, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 2914. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2918, with a range of 2568–3268.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2568–3268, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2500), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Clinical Medicine 8-year, Computer Science). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 3200), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
